subject: pinctrl: baytrail: Fix potential NULL pointer dereference
notes: POC regen #1: initial POC did not dereference saved_context within probe_buggy; pattern requires same-function deref for monolithic detector. Regenerated POC with loop body that writes vg->saved_context[i].val.

Verifier-v1 strict pass on regen #1: OK(F1.acq=0 F1.rel=0 F3.goto=0 F5.ret=2 F2.if=1). Note devm_kcalloc is not in verifier-v1 acquire API list (kcalloc/kmalloc family only), so F1 counts compare 0=0.

Query iteration #1 empty (sameStorage join broken via DataFlow on lvalue). Iter #2: rewrote to use sameStorage predicate matching PointerFieldAccess on same Field+base Variable; result fires exactly on probe_buggy and is silent on probe_fixed (NULL guard recognized via NotExpr+sameStorage).
